mapper.select:
SELECT a.artwork_id, a.member_id, a.category_id, a.is_status, a.title, a.content, a.view_count, a.reg_dt, a.mod_dt, a.comp_dt FROM artwork a
AND a.is_status = #{isStatus}
AND ( a.is_status = 'N' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM artwork_entry e WHERE e.artwork_id = a.artwork_id) )
AND a.title LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
ORDER BY a.artwork_id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artwork a
AND a.is_status = #{isStatus}
AND ( a.is_status = 'N' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM artwork_entry e WHERE e.artwork_id = a.artwork_id) )
AND a.title LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'

SELECT a.artwork_id, a.member_id, a.category_id, a.is_status, a.title, a.content, a.view_count, a.reg_dt, a.mod_dt, a.comp_dt, m.nickname, c.category_nm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_like l WHERE l.target_type = 'ARTWORK' AND l.target_id = a.artwork_id) AS like_count FROM artwork a JOIN member m ON a.member_id = m.member_id JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.category_id WHERE a.artwork_id = #{artworkId}
mapper.update: UPDATE artwork SET is_status = 'Y', comp_dt = SYSDATE WHERE artwork_id = #{artworkId}
mapper.sql: a.artwork_id, a.member_id, a.category_id, a.is_status, a.title, a.view_count, a.reg_dt, a.mod_dt, a.comp_dt, m.nickname, c.category_nm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_like l WHERE l.target_type = 'ARTWORK' AND l.target_id = a.artwork_id) AS like_count, NVL((SELECT MAX(f.file_id) FROM attach_file f WHERE f.target_type = 'ARTWORK' AND f.target_id = a.artwork_id AND f.is_rep = 'Y'), 0) AS rep_file_id
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY (t.like_count * #{likeWeight} + t.view_count) DESC, t.artwork_id DESC) AS rn FROM ( SELECT FROM artwork a JOIN member m ON a.member_id = m.member_id JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.category_id WHERE a.is_status = 'Y' ) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN ((#{pageNo} - 1) * #{pageSize} + 1) AND (#{pageNo} * #{pageSize}) ORDER BY rn

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY (t.like_count * #{likeWeight} + t.view_count) DESC, t.artwork_id DESC) AS rn FROM ( SELECT FROM artwork a JOIN member m ON a.member_id = m.member_id JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.category_id WHERE a.is_status = 'Y' AND a.reg_dt >= SYSDATE - #{days} ) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN ((#{pageNo} - 1) * #{pageSize} + 1) AND (#{pageNo} * #{pageSize}) ORDER BY rn

SELECT FROM board_like bl JOIN artwork a ON bl.target_id = a.artwork_id JOIN member m ON a.member_id = m.member_id JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.category_id WHERE bl.target_type = 'ARTWORK' AND bl.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY bl.like_id DESC

choose.when: AND ( a.is_status = 'N' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM artwork_entry e WHERE e.artwork_id = a.artwork_id) )

choose.otherwise: AND ( a.title LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR a.content LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR m.nickname LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR c.category_nm LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.artwork_id DESC) AS rn FROM artwork a JOIN member m ON a.member_id = m.member_id JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.category_id
) WHERE rn BETWEEN ((#{pageNo} - 1) * #{pageSize} + 1) AND (#{pageNo} * #{pageSize}) ORDER BY rn
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artwork a JOIN member m ON a.member_id = m.member_id JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.category_id
